name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT MAX_READERS   (* maximum number of simultaneous readers *)

VARIABLE readerCount,, writerActive, writersWaiting
          writersWaiting,
          writerActive,

(* auxiliary constants *)
CONSTURING := {1 .. MAX_READERS}

ASSUME MaxReadersBounded:
    MAX_READERS >= 1

TypeInvariant ==
    /\ readerCount \in 0..MAX_READERS
    /\ writersWaiting \geq 0
    /\ writerActive \in BOOLEAN

Init ==
    /\ readerCount = 0
    /\ writersWaiting = 0
    /\ writerActive = FALSE

ReadRequest ==
    /\ readerCount < MAX_READERS
    /\ writerActive = FALSE
    /\ readerCount' = readerCount + 1
    /\ Unchanged <<writersWaiting>>

ReadRelease ==
    /\ readerCount > 0
    /\ readerCount' = readerCount - 1
    /\ Unchanged <<writerActive, writersWaiting>>

WriterRequest ==
    /\ UNCHANGED readerCount
    /\ writerActive = FALSE
    /\ writersWaiting' = writersWaiting + 1
    /\ Unchanged <<readerCount>>

WriterStart ==
    /\ writerActive = FALSE
    /\ writersWaiting > 0
    /\ readerCount = 0
    /\ writerActive' = TRUE
    /\ writersWaiting' = writersWaiting - 1

WriteComplete ==
    /\ writerActive = TRUE
    /\ writerActive' = FALSE
    /\ Unchanged <<readerCount, writersWaiting>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminate == 
    /\ UNCHANGED <<readerCount, writersWaiting, writerActive>> 

Next ==
    \/ ReadRequest
    \/ ReadRelease
    \/ WriterRequest
    \/ WriterStart
    \/ WriteComplete
    \/ Terminate

Spec == Init /\\ [][ Next ]_<<readerCount,writersWaiting,writerActive>>
====
